name: Hurry Tuna, Please
recipeIngredient: 12-1/2 ounce can white or light meat tuna, drained
1 chicken bouillon cube dissolved in 1 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna can.
2. Heat oil in a pan; add apple and onion, stirring until lightly browned.
3. Add flour, stirring to combine with vegetables.
4. Gradually whisk in milk and dissolved bouillon until smooth white sauce forms (lumps from apples/onions are normal).
5. Break up tuna into small pieces and mix into the sauce.
6. Sprinkle curry powder over the mixture and stir well.
7. Serve over noodles that cook for 9 minutes or cooked rice.
